summary: A day on which you left the door on the latch.

voice_notes.notes: Low security reads as comfort with the day's edges being unfinished. Never call this reckless. The world is allowed to be a little ajar.

signal_moments: the door you closed but did not lock
exemplars.output: You left the plan half-made and the door you closed at the end of the night, you did not bother to lock. The world is allowed to be a little ajar without it costing anything important. The amount of certainty you needed today was a small amount, and you spent it well.
exemplars.notes: Validates the ajar-world stance without making it sound foolhardy.
